note: A green run that proved nothing must be rejected. hide_pytest forces the unittest path (exit 0 + 'Ran 0 tests') so the _zero_tests guard -- not pytest's exit-5 -- is what's under test; that is the real H-LOOPTEAM-1 false-green.
